message:
fix(audit): correct 5 bugs found during deep code audit

- JSONL rotation: delete oldest file before shifting to prevent silent
  overwrite of the max rotation slot (logger/jsonl.rs)
- VoI scheduler: add is_finite() guard on forecast_reclaim to prevent
  NaN/Infinity from corrupting MAPE calibration (monitor/voi_scheduler.rs)
- Self-monitor: replace unwrap() with unwrap_or_else(Instant::now) on
  checked_sub to prevent panic on clock skew (daemon/self_monitor.rs)
- Deletion executor: remove spurious ScanCompleted event from dry-run
  logging that inflated stats engine counts (scanner/deletion.rs)
- Protection docs: correct "breadth-first" to "depth-first" since
  Vec::pop() implements LIFO traversal (scanner/protection.rs)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
